title: Mar 2, 2026
summary: Fix directional model expansion and pre-start badge refresh for BMC strategies.

features.title: Fix Directional Model Expansion
features.summary: Fixed BMC_PATH resolution bug that prevented UP/DOWN model pair expansion on engine start
features.description:
The agent's _expand_directional_strategies() function used an incorrect number of parent directory traversals to resolve the py_proj path. It resolved to ma-tracker-app/py_proj (which doesn't exist) instead of the correct sibling path dev/py_proj.

This caused directional expansion to silently fail for ALL tickers — the registry path check returned early, and every ticker loaded as a single undirected strategy (bmc_spy instead of bmc_spy_up + bmc_spy_down). The same off-by-one existed in the strategy module's BMC_PATH resolution.

Fixed by adding one additional .parent traversal in both ib_data_agent.py and strategies/big_move_convexity.py. Now correctly resolves to the py_proj sibling directory on both local (~/dev/) and production (~/apps/) layouts. Agent v1.23.1.
